name: Indonesian BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together corn syrup, peanut butter, soy sauce, vinegar, onion, garlic, ginger and pepper until well blended.
2. Brush the mixture onto chicken, pork chops, spareribs or steak during the last 20 minutes of grilling. Turn and baste frequently with sauce.
3. Makes about 1 2/3 cups.
